name: Barrel Open Back Accent Chair Velvet Camel - Threshold™: Luxury Glam, Smooth Finish, Upholstered, Solid Pattern, 250 lb Capacity
description:
Style your home with the sophisticated look of the Barrel Open Back Accent Chair from Threshold™. This camel accent chair features a rounded design with an open back for modern appeal. Upholstered in a velvet fabric, this accent chair comes complete with cushions to help you sit in comfort. This accent chair looks great in any room while waiting to be used when guests arrive.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
